title: stylidium cymiferum
intro: Stylidium cymiferum, also known as the button clover or button triggerplant, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae, native to Western Australia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain flavonoids and other compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of S. cymiferum include its potential to treat minor skin irritations, wounds, and infections, due to its antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, but further research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
